ast: kurtosis(a)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                               |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                        |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([0, 0]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: kurtosis(dec)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                               |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| dec    | Column(Decimal64([1.10, 2.20, 3.30, 4.40]))                        |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([0, 0]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: kurtosis(flat)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                               |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+
| flat   | Column(UInt64([7, 7, 7, 7]))                                       |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([0, 0]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------+


error: kurtosis does not support type 'Null'

ast: kurtosis(x_null)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                            |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0011] }) |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([0, 0]), validity: [0b______11] }              |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
